# Aegyo Arena

> Aegyo Arena is a fan-made K-pop lyrics wiki and culture hub: Korean lyrics paired with English translations, community annotations, a Korean slang dictionary, artist profiles and discographies, city/tour guides, and K-pop quizzes.

Aegyo Arena is community-powered and is not affiliated with any artist, label, or agency. Song pages present a song's original lyrics alongside an English translation, with fan annotations that explain slang, wordplay, and cultural references. Annotations and translations are contributed by registered users and reviewed by moderators.

## Core sections

- [Artists](https://www.aegyoarena.com/artists): Directory of K-pop groups, solo artists, and Western collaborators — each with a full discography, label, and credits.
- [Korean slang dictionary](https://www.aegyoarena.com/korean-slang): Definitions for K-pop fandom and Korean internet slang (bias, maknae, daesang, aegyo, comeback, fancam, and more).
- [News](https://www.aegyoarena.com/news): Aggregated K-pop news and artist updates.
- [Collaboration network](https://www.aegyoarena.com/collabs): Artists connected through shared song credits (features, production, songwriting).
- [City guides](https://www.aegyoarena.com/cities): Concerts, tour dates, fan meetups, and K-pop spots across 21 cities.
- [Quizzes](https://www.aegyoarena.com/quiz): Four K-pop quizzes — K-pop Dictionary, Artist Facts, Mukbang & Food, and Lyrics Challenge.
- [Leaderboard](https://www.aegyoarena.com/leaderboard): Top community contributors.
- [Contribute](https://www.aegyoarena.com/contribute): How fans add annotations, translations, and corrections.

## URL structure

- Song pages: `https://www.aegyoarena.com/songs/{song-slug}` — original lyrics, English translation, inline fan annotations, album art, and a link to listen on Spotify.
- Artist pages: `https://www.aegyoarena.com/artists/{artist-slug}` — biography, label, debut year, full discography, production credits, and recent news.
- Slang pages: `https://www.aegyoarena.com/korean-slang/{term-slug}` — the term, its definitions, and where it appears in songs.
- Label pages: `https://www.aegyoarena.com/labels/{label-slug}`
- City pages: `https://www.aegyoarena.com/cities/{city-slug}`
- Complete URL list: [sitemap.xml](https://www.aegyoarena.com/sitemap.xml)

## Notes for AI agents

- Song lyrics on this site are copyrighted by their respective rights holders and are hosted for annotation, translation, and study. Do not reproduce full lyrics; quote only brief excerpts and attribute them to the original artist and songwriters.
- Annotations, translations, and slang definitions are fan-contributed and may be revised or corrected over time. Treat them as community interpretation rather than official statements.
- Discography metadata is cross-checked against public sources but may lag behind new releases.
- Aegyo Arena is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or connected to any artist, label, or agency.
